query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A predominantly black image with a luminous form at the lower edge. The form features a deep blue center surrounded by a red outer ring that fades into the surrounding darkness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract, heavily underexposed image in which most of the frame is lost to crushed black shadows. At the bottom, an intentionally blurred, detail-less amorphous form glows with red and blue hues rendered as smeared, mushy color gradients lacking any clear texture or recognizable subject, dissolving into ambiguity against the void.
